hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$FILE" in *package-lock.json*|*node_modules*|*.env*|*.env.local*|*.git/*) echo "Blocked: $FILE is protected" >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); for p in 'rm -rf' 'DROP TABLE' 'TRUNCATE' 'git reset --hard' 'git push --force' 'git push -f' 'git clean -f'; do echo "$CMD" | grep -qi "$p" && echo "Blocked: contains '$p'" >&2 && exit 2; done; exit 0
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json|*.css|*.md) npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null;; esac; exit 0

hooks.prompt: Run `npx tsc --noEmit` in /Volumes/iMac\ RAID/Claude/io-admin. If there are TypeScript errors, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "list the errors"}. If clean, respond {"ok": true}.
